title: selaginella serpens
intro: Selaginella serpens, also known as serpent's grass or creeping spike moss, is a species of evergreen perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella serpens include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Selaginella serpens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
